name: Lily Cookies#4
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream cheese, butter, and all-purpose flour until well combined.
2. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Cut out shapes with a glass.
4. Place the cutouts on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Add 1 teaspoon of jelly in the center of each cookie and fold the sides over to form a lily shape.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
7. While the cookies are still hot, dip them in powdered sugar.
